Description: A Proficiency (or Lite Annex) is the smallest mimetic unit about the Proficiency’s subject. It represents knowledge, memories and experiences that Character has learned or had.
Rules: A Single Proficiency is the smallest mimetic unit about the Proficiency’s subject. Two Proficiencies may be added during a Crisis to create a Skill. Or an additional Proficiency may be added to a Skill to create a Talent. Lite Characters just use Lite Annexes, which may increase one level when a Crisis occurs.
preGeneratedLore: The smallest unit of distilled experience, representing a singular insight or a hard-won memory. It is the foundation of knowledge, a building block of the soul that can be refined and combined into greater masteries.

Description: Two Proficiencies working together (usually with the Boons of a Character’s or a Plot’s Statblock of Facets).
Rules: Two Proficiencies add their respective Facet Values to find a Boon Value for the Skill. One Proficiency provides the Root Facet the other the Channelling Facet. Characters may have as many Skill Annexes as their largest Hitch’s Marks (Banes Reduced) and may have no more Skills than active Personality Proficiencies. Descendants (including Extras) may have a maximum number of SKills dependent upon the Master Annex Type. Skills may have Additional Proficiency Slots equal to their Boon Reduced.
preGeneratedLore: The harmonious blending of two distinct insights, where knowledge meets action. It is the practical application of the spirit, allowing a being to navigate the world with a practiced grace and a deepening competence.

Description: At least three or four Proficiencies working together. One of them must be acting as a Root, another a Channel,  Tangle, another must act as an Umbral.
Rules: Characters may have as many additional Proficiencies in a Talent as their number of Hitches Reduced. Alternatively a Talent may have only 1 Umbral and at most 2 Nimbeds. A Character may have as many Talents as their Highest Hitch’s Marks (Banes Reduced) and have active Skills. Umbral Proficiencies in the Talent allows up to 2 Nimbed Proficiency Slots (although you don’t have to have any Nimbeds unless optional Rules would make it a Power.). Descendants (including Extras) may have a maximum number of Talents dependant upon the Master Annex Type. Talent Master Annexes may have 2 Skills.
preGeneratedLore: A complex weave of multiple masteries, where the spirit's focus becomes sharp and multi-faceted. It is a sign of true dedication, where the inner nature and outward action are bound together in a potent display of capability.

Description: At least three, and normally around 5-6 Proficiencies in the same Annex. At least one of them is an Umbral.
Rules: A Power may have one additional Proficiency for each Hitch the Character has. Optional Rule: A Power is a Talent with more than 1 Umbral Proficiency (note this reduces the ability of Yarn-Tellers to best Powers with their Talents). A Character may have as many Powers as their Personality Draw, or their Highest Hitch Ruins, or their Number of Active Talents Reduced, which ever is smaller. Descendants (including Extras) may have a maximum of 2 Powers if they have a Super-Annex Master Annex. Master-Annex Powers may have 2 Talents beneath them or Power Score Skills and Additional Proficiencies.
preGeneratedLore: The manifestation of profound spiritual resolve, where multiple masteries are bound into a single, overwhelming force. It is the peak of individual mastery, capable of shaping the world through the sheer weight of its practitioners' will.

Description: A Super-Annex is the most powerful of the Descendant Annexes. Any other Annex can be promoted to Super status (becoming a Super-Skill, Super-Talent or Super-Power as required).
Rules: A Super Annex automatically adds Boons directly from Proficiency Facets and gains all the Nimbeds of any Facet that is providing Boons to the Annex. A Yarn-Teller (Solo/Fae/Greater Demon) may have 1 Super-Annex. Artefacts can also occasionally grant Super-Annexes to any Character. Descendants can have a maximum of 1 Super-Annex and it must be the Master Annex of the Descendant. A Master Super-Annex can have a maximum of 2 Powers beneath it, or Super-Annex Score Talents, Skills, and Proficiencies.
preGeneratedLore: The ultimate expression of the spirit's dominion, where the very laws of reality bend to the will of the master. It is a transcendent state of being, where action and essence are indistinguishable, and the results are as legendary as they are indomitable.

Description: A Pact Annex is a separate form of Annex that is created by groups of people working together. Each Member has some access to the Pact based on whether they paid for Skill, Talent, Power, Super Access.
Rules: A Pact Annex is not created with Proficiencies, but from the Size and Types of its membership.
preGeneratedLore: The collective resonance of many souls bound by a shared purpose. It is the strength of the community made manifest, where the individual's light is amplified by the presence of their allies.

Description: A Size Annex is the Master Annex of any Location Descendant, and defines the Size of any Location or Character according to the Sway table as Chi
Rules: Size Annexes are not built from Proficiencies, but instead relate solely to the Size of the Location (or Kaiju Monster) being described.
preGeneratedLore: The physical weight of existence, from the smallest singularity to the vast expanse of the planetary body. It is the measure of one's presence in the material world, defining the scale upon which their story unfolds.

Description: A Personality Annex is the Master Annex of any major Character (Extras use normal Annex equivalents for simplicity).
Rules: Personality Annexes add Hitches, Personas and Cores to a Character. The Personality governs all other Annex usage.
preGeneratedLore: The core of the individual, where aspirations, burdens, and inner truths are bound into a unique singularity. It is the master of all other masteries, the lens through which the spirit perceives and acts upon the universe.

Description: Conflicts are the Master Annexes of Plots. They can add Monster Facets to the Plot’s Characters, and have direct effects on the Extras, Quests, Ordeals, etc.
Rules: Conflicts add the Boons of their Conflict Facets directly together like SUper Annexes.
preGeneratedLore: The turbulent resonance of a grand narrative, where opposing forces clash and the world is reshaped by their struggle. It is the master of plots, the crucible in which heroes are forged and empires are lost.
